item.title: Omic's : from data to patients
Transcriptome analysis of model systems
item.description:

Sem viverra aliquet eget sit amet tellus cras adipiscing. Imperdiet dui accumsan sit amet nulla facilisi. Eget lorem dolor sed viverra. Sit amet volutpat consequat mauris nunc congue. Arcu risus quis varius quam quisque id diam vel. Libero enim sed faucibus turpis in. Ac felis donec et odio pellentesque diam volutpat commodo. item.title: From Transcriptomics to Treatment in Inherited Optic Neuropathies
Transcriptome profiling of zebrafish optic fissure fusion
Genome-wide RNA-Sequencing analysis identifies a distinct fibrosis gene signature in the conjunctiva after glaucoma surgery
